rationale: The citing paper mentions Narayanan and Nair (2013) only once, in the measurement-error discussion, as an example of a similar empirical strategy used in marketing. The core methodological grounding is attributed to Griliches and Hausman (1986), and the paper does not develop hypotheses, identification, or interpretation around Narayanan and Nair specifically. There is no direct reuse of that paper's installed-base framework or its substantive findings in the argument of this study.
